description: Expert-curated Pauline passages aligned to typical 'Body of Christ / liberty / weak brother / judgment seat / mystery / riches' transcript outlines. Used by scripts/build-transcript-chunk.mjs to emit verse-meta + KJV.

blocks.theme: The Body of Christ — many members, one body
Individual freedom, conscience, and receiving the weak
The judgment seat of Christ and new creation in Christ
Paul’s gospel, the mystery, and the unsearchable riches of Christ
Walking worthy — humility, unity, and growth from Christ
